svg.text: • 435. Non-overlapping Intervals — sort by end, take earliest-finishing
• 452. Min Arrows to Burst Balloons — same earliest-finish-first idea
• 56. Merge Intervals — sort by start, merge overlapping
• 253. Meeting Rooms II — heap of end times, greedy room reuse
• 621. Task Scheduler — pick most-frequent task that is off cooldown
• 763. Partition Labels — extend partition to cover last index of each char
• 55. Jump Game — track furthest reachable index
• 45. Jump Game II — extend reach in O(n) by counting jumps
• 134. Gas Station — start at first station after a deficit; one pass works
• 122. Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock II — sum every positive delta
• 376. Wiggle Subsequence — count direction changes greedily
• 406. Queue Reconstruction by Height — sort tall-first, insert by k
Sort by the right key, then take what you cannot afford to leave.
